headline: TopDawg Ranked #1 U.S. Dropshipping Supplier for 2026 by USA Today, Leading the Shift to Domestic Fulfillment and Automation
summary: TopDawg, a leading U.S.-based dropshipping platform, wholesale supplier network, and automation solution, has been ranked #1 U.S. Dropshipping Supplier for 2026 in a recent USA Today feature highlighting the top platforms shaping the future of online retail.

headline: Seedtag Welcomes Brendan McCarthy as Chief Marketing & Communications Officer
summary: Seedtag, the global Neuro-Contextual advertising company, announced today the appointment of Brendan McCarthy as Chief Marketing & Communications Officer. McCarthy will oversee Seedtag's global marketing and communications strategy, supporting the company's rapid international expansion while driving the evolution of privacy-first, Neuro-Contextual advertising across the open web and CTV.

headline: eBay to cut around 800 roles amid restructuring drive
summary: In a statement emailed to Retail Insight Network, a spokesperson said the restructuring would involve certain positions across the workforce.
